title: storagearchitecturestrategydocument
content:
# storagearchitecture ## dataSSD
- equipment：storage-hot-01，NVMe SSD
- capacity：10TB
- storagedata：7daysdata
- alert：> 80%
- data：userlog、record、cache ## dataHDD
- equipment：storage-warm-01，RAID-6 HDD16
- capacity：50TB
- storagedata：7days-90daysdata
- RAID-6：2failure
- IOPS：1200
- latency：<= 20ms ## datastorage
- equipment：MinIOcluster
- storagedata：>90daysarchivedata
- retain：2
- budget：21000
- strategy：lifecycle-policy-coldexpireddelete ## migration
- task：auto-tier-migrate
- →：execute，migration>7daysdata
- →：weeklyexecute，migration>90daysdata
- migrationtime：AM02:00-06:00
- migration：300Mbps
- NFS：/mnt/warm-storage
author: Infrastructure Team

title: 3storageincidentrecord
content:

- errorinformation：NFS mount point /mnt/warm-storage is stale
- cause：dataNFSserverrestartnfsd
- taskconfigurationfailed ## 228
- updatedatastrategylifecycle-policy-cold

- configurationfileJSONerror，MinIOstrategy
